appraisal.description: A scorched music box whose cylinder clicks even when the lid is shut.

clues.result: Ash is packed inside the comb teeth, but none has fallen onto the desk.
UV light shows the words 'play me home' burned into the underside of the lid.
The music box cools only while the cylinder is turning.

appraisal.wrong_handling_consequence: If kept or sold, the tune resumes from an empty nursery after midnight.

generation.concept_prompt: Local prototype concept for Ashen Music Box.
generation.model_prompt: Local procedural prototype model for Ashen Music Box.
